author: Suspect
text:
Add bl doctor: read-only repo/bl drift diagnostic

Inspects the repo and store read-only, names each drift, and points at the command that fixes it. repair stays the only action verb.

Checks: discovery failure (precise bl-597e reason, plus connecting a bl-referencing doc to a never-init'd repo), unreadable config, a tasks_dir override pointing nowhere, a state worktree that is no longer a valid linked git worktree, stale claims, and orphan worktree dirs. Exit is always 0; the verdict is the text.

Pure logic in src/doctor.rs; src/commands/doctor.rs is a thin print wrapper. 100% line coverage via tests/doctor.rs. SKILL.md and README document the command.
